name: Djem So Mastery
description: When a unit with the Djem So Mastery keyword defends against a Melee attack, during the Compare Results step, the attacking unit suffers 1 Wound if the attack roll contains 1 or more Blank results.
official_rules_text: When a unit with the Djem So Mastery keyword defends against a Melee attack, during the Compare Results step, the attacking unit suffers 1 Wound if the attack roll contains 1 or more Blank results.
